'''鈭歱-n-ch-t''' ('''kapanchetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backslap|backslap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backslap|backslap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kapanchetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanchetoko|thipanchetoko]] || [[word:jipanchetoko|jipanchetoko]] || [[word:shipanchetoko|shipanchetoko]] || [[word:kipanchetoko|kipanchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanchetoko|thuthupanchetoko]] || [[word:jujupanchetoko|jujupanchetoko]] || [[word:shushupanchetoko|shushupanchetoko]] || [[word:kukupanchetoko|kukupanchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupanchetoko|thupanchetoko]] || [[word:jupanchetoko|jupanchetoko]] || [[word:shupanchetoko|shupanchetoko]] || [[word:kupanchetoko|kupanchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupanchetoko|thupanchetoko]] || [[word:jupanchetoko|jupanchetoko]] || [[word:shupanchetoko|shupanchetoko]] || [[word:kupanchetoko|kupanchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepanchetoko|thepanchetoko]] || [[word:jepanchetoko|jepanchetoko]] || [[word:shepanchetoko|shepanchetoko]] || [[word:kepanchetoko|kepanchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopanchetoko|thothopanchetoko]] || [[word:jojopanchetoko|jojopanchetoko]] || [[word:shoshopanchetoko|shoshopanchetoko]] || [[word:kokopanchetoko|kokopanchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopanchetoko|thopanchetoko]] || [[word:jopanchetoko|jopanchetoko]] || [[word:shopanchetoko|shopanchetoko]] || [[word:kopanchetoko|kopanchetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanchetoko|thopanchetoko]] || [[word:jopanchetoko|jopanchetoko]] || [[word:shopanchetoko|shopanchetoko]] || [[word:kopanchetoko|kopanchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙panchetoko|th忙panchetoko]] || [[word:j忙panchetoko|j忙panchetoko]] || [[word:sh忙panchetoko|sh忙panchetoko]] || [[word:k忙panchetoko|k忙panchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapanchetoko|thathapanchetoko]] || [[word:jajapanchetoko|jajapanchetoko]] || [[word:shashapanchetoko|shashapanchetoko]] || [[word:kakapanchetoko|kakapanchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapanchetoko|thapanchetoko]] || [[word:japanchetoko|japanchetoko]] || [[word:shapanchetoko|shapanchetoko]] || [[word:kapanchetoko|kapanchetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapanchetoko|thapanchetoko]] || [[word:japanchetoko|japanchetoko]] || [[word:shapanchetoko|shapanchetoko]] || [[word:kapanchetoko|kapanchetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
